name: klaviyo-enterprise-rbac
description: Configure Klaviyo enterprise access control with API key scopes and OAuth. Use when implementing per-key scoping, configuring OAuth app authorization, or setting up organization-level access controls for Klaviyo. Trigger with phrases like "klaviyo scopes", "klaviyo RBAC", "klaviyo enterprise", "klaviyo permissions", "klaviyo OAuth", "klaviyo access control".
